节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Operation not permit at current state.
Define local device network id for audio
Define default volume group id for audio
Define default interrupt group id for audio

Obtains an {@link AudioManager} instance.

NOTE: The {@link AudioManager} instance is not a singleton.
Obtains an {@link AudioCapturer} instance. This method uses an asynchronous callback to return the capturer instance.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<AudioCapturer> } callback - Callback used to return the audio capturer instance.

parameters.说明: Callback used to return the audio capturer instance.

节点.功能描述: Obtains an {@link AudioCapturer} instance. This method uses a promise to return the capturer instance.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<AudioCapturer> } Promise used to return the audio capturer instance.
节点.return_description: Promise used to return the audio capturer instance.

节点.功能描述: Obtains an {@link AudioRenderer} instance. This method uses a promise to return the renderer instance. The AudioRenderer instance is used to play streaming audio data. When using AudioRenderer apis, there are many instructions for application to achieve better performance and lower power consumption: In music or audiobook background playback situation, you can have low power consumption by following this best practices document **Low-Power Rules in Music Playback Scenarios**. And for navigation situation, you can follow **Low-Power Rules in Navigation and Positioning Scenarios**. Application developer should also be careful when app goes to background, please check if your audio playback is still needed, see **Audio Resources** in best practices document. And avoiding to send silence audio data continuously to waste system resources, otherwise system will take control measures when this behavior is detected, see **Audio Playback** in best practices document. If you want to use AudioRenderer api to implement a music playback application, there are also many interactive scenes to consider, see **Developing an Audio Application** in best practices document.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<AudioRenderer> } callback - Callback used to return the audio renderer instance.

parameters.说明: Callback used to return the audio renderer instance.

节点.功能描述: Obtains an {@link AudioRenderer} instance. This method uses a promise to return the renderer instance. The AudioRenderer instance is used to play streaming audio data. When using AudioRenderer apis, there are many instructions for application to achieve better performance and lower power consumption: In music or audiobook background playback situation, you can have low power consumption by following this best practices document **Low-Power Rules in Music Playback Scenarios**. And for navigation situation, you can follow **Low-Power Rules in Navigation and Positioning Scenarios**. Application developer should also be careful when app goes to background, please check if your audio playback is still needed, see **Audio Resources** in best practices document. And avoiding to send silence audio data continuously to waste system resources, otherwise system will take control measures when this behavior is detected, see **Audio Playback** in best practices document. If you want to use AudioRenderer api to implement a music playback application, there are also many interactive scenes to consider, see **Developing an Audio Application** in best practices document.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<AudioRenderer> } Promise used to return the audio renderer instance.
节点.return_description: Promise used to return the audio renderer instance.

节点.功能描述: Obtains a {@link TonePlayer} instance. This method uses an asynchronous callback to return the renderer instance.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<TonePlayer> } callback - Callback used to return the tonePlayer instance.

节点.功能描述: Creates an AudioLoopback instance, which provides low-latency in-ear monitoring using a fast capturer and renderer.
注释信息: @returns { Promise } Promise used to return the AudioLoopback instance.
节点.return_description: Promise used to return the AudioLoopback instance.

节点.功能描述: The hardware mode of audio loopback.
Audio loopback unavailable by the output or input device. For example, the device change.
Audio loopback unavailable by the audio scene. For example, the audio interrupt.
Audio volume type for voice calls.
Audio volume type for media purpose.
Audio volume type for alarm purpose.
Audio volume type for accessibility purpose.
Audio volume type for voice assistant.
Audio volume type for all common.
Wired headset, which is a combination of a pair of earpieces and a microphone.
Bluetooth device using the synchronous connection oriented link (SCO).
Bluetooth device using advanced audio distribution profile (A2DP).
Device type for rerouting audio to other remote devices by system application
Accessory devices, such as the mic on remote control.
HDMI device, such as HDMI, ARC, eARC
Line connected digital output device, such as s/pdif
